allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/summarize -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"Test paper","abstract":"This study investigates the role of p53 in apoptosis using cultured human cells and gene expression analysis to understand tumor suppression mechanisms in cancer."}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('title:',d.get\('title'\)[:70]\); print\('journal:',d.get\('journal'\)\); print\('year:',d.get\('pub_year'\)\); print\('authors:',d.get\('authors'\)[:3]\); print\('abstract_len:', len\(d.get\('abstract'\) or ''\)\)")
Bash(git commit -q -m 'PaperLens MVP: FastAPI backend + React frontend *)
